name: @fleet-commander/plugin
description: Fleet Commander Claude Code & Codex plugin — forwards coding-agent activity to your phone, plus optional remote approvals and the ask_human MCP tool (the agent pauses for a free-text answer from your phone).

scripts.test: node test/danger.mjs && node test/approve-hook.mjs && node test/heartbeat.mjs && node test/detail.mjs && node test/setup-cli.mjs && node test/mcp-ask-human.mjs && node test/integration.mjs
